reason: Browser use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned it in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut home screen with agent list visible.
Found and clicked on "QA-20260722-231328-kukt" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — Message appeared in the input box.
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent successfully and agent started processing (status changed to "working").
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed within 14 seconds (well within the timeout).
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly shows multiple instances:
Took screenshot of response — Screenshot captured showing the complete chat session with the agent's response displaying "Example Domain".
